title: (Cobblemon) Rotom Phone
description: Adds a custom 3D Rotom Phone to Cobblemon!
body:
This resource pack edits the model/texture of the [Smartphone](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-smartphone) by NBP, attempting to make them look closer to the visual style of Minecraft and Cobblemon as a whole.

Obviously, the mod is required for this resource pack to do anything, as well as all of its dependencies.
